assertionSummary: Root package.json must not define dev:mapgen-studio.
implementationOutcome: unchanged command-check branch; JSON package script topology is not a Grit source-pattern conversion in this slice

assertionSummary: mapgen-studio dev target must run vite continuously, depend on serve-daemon, and not depend directly on build:studio-recipes.
implementationOutcome: unchanged command-check branch; target graph/order semantics belong to Nx or a data-driven topology runner, not Grit

assertionSummary: serve-daemon target must run bun src/server/daemon/daemon.ts continuously and depend on mod-swooper-maps build:studio-recipes.

assertionSummary: App package scripts must not define dev, dev:frontend, dev:server, devLive.ts, or bun --watch dev script paths.

assertionSummary: Retired devLive.ts daemon file must not exist.

assertionSummary: Daemon source must mention STUDIO_DAEMON_PORT and Vite config must mention STUDIO_DEV_PORT and STUDIO_DEV_RPC_TARGET.

assertionSummary: Evaluated Vite serve config must ignore generated/deploy output paths.
